array.string: cd /Users/macbookpro/Documents/bodhi && mkdir -p logs && for p in 4000 5173; do lsof -ti:$p 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; sleep 1 && nohup npm run dev -w @seneca/server > logs/server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > logs/server.pid && nohup npm run dev -w @seneca/dashboard > logs/dashboard.log 2>&1 & echo $! > logs/dashboard.pid && sleep 15 && curl -s http://localhost:4000/ > /dev/null && echo "BODHI ready"
